caption: A close-up shot captures a white cloth with colorful striped edges draped over a textured brown post. Behind the cloth, a person wearing a white shirt is partially visible, though their face remains out of frame. As the scene progresses, the person's arm and hand enter the frame, holding a blue folder or notebook. The background remains dark and out of focus. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the scene, stating, "I like reading, I like writing, I am a slam artist, and I am also a journalist." The camera remains stationary throughout the sequence, with the only movement being the introduction of the blue object and the shifting of the person's position behind the draped fabric.
